title: _Nonnull data parameter allows NULL when len is 0
description:
File: lichen/subsys/lichen/meshcore/include/lichen/meshcore/adapter.h
Line: 155-157

File: lichen/subsys/lichen/meshcore/adapter.c
Line: 1113-1120

The header declares data as _Nonnull:
```c
int lichen_meshcore_adapter_feed_stream(
    struct lichen_meshcore_adapter *_Nonnull adapter,
    const uint8_t *_Nonnull data, size_t len);
```

But the implementation allows NULL when len is 0:
```c
if (adapter == NULL || (data == NULL && len > 0U)) {
    return -EINVAL;
}
```

This is inconsistent with the _Nonnull annotation. Either:
1. The annotation should be _Nullable (or removed)
2. The check should be `data == NULL` unconditionally
close_reason: Fixed: changed check from (data == NULL && len > 0U) to (data == NULL) to match _Nonnull annotation
